original_file: REMINDER: Introducing a new layer of advanced scam protection!
email_subject: REMINDER: Introducing a new layer of advanced scam protection!
email_body:
Avast Now catch scam calls, texts, and deepfakes quickly with Avast Premium Security https://click.emails.avast.com/?%3D https://click.emails.avast.com/?%3D%3D View in browser NEW: Detect deepfakes and mobile scams A new layer of protection against today’s scams You already trust Avast to protect your devices. But you can be exposed to modern scams like urgent fake calls and texts, as well as manipulative deepfake content, before any type of malware is involved. They rely on urgency, realism, and snap decisions. To help you make informed choices, Avast Premium Security adds an advanced, AI-powered layer of protection. Now you can catch deepfakes on your PC1, and risky calls and texts on your phone, in one plan that works alongside the protection you’re already using — not instead of it. Save 60% Avast Premium Security $77.99 $31.08 / 1st yr It’s like $2.59 per month https://click.emails.avast.com/?%3D Buy now See terms below* Avast can now help you: New & AI-powered Get extra protection against mobile scams SMS Guard and Call Guard detect potential scam texts and calls, so you know when it’s safe to reply. New & AI-powered Get extra protection against mobile scams SMS Guard and Call Guard detect potential scam texts and calls, so you know when it’s safe to reply. New & AI-powered Catch fake content more easily Deepfake Guard helps you identify AI‑generated media on your PC, so it’s less likely to fool you.1 New & AI-powered Catch fake content more easily Deepfake Guard helps you identify AI‑generated media on your PC, so it’s less likely to fool you.1 Keep your devices and data safer Continued real-time protection against malware and the rising threat of hackers and remote attacks. Keep your devices and data safer Continued real-time protection against malware and the rising threat of hackers and remote attacks. Then $77.99/year. Savings compared to the renewal price. After the first term, your subscription will automatically continue for the renewal price every year and you will automatically be charged for a one-year period every year. If this price changes, we’ll let you know before you’re charged. Up to 60 days before your subscription ends, we’ll send you an email reminder. Cancel your subscription renewal at least 30 days before your current period ends if you do not want to be charged.

1 Automatic Deepfake Guard works only on Instagram, Dailymotion, Facebook, TikTok, Twitch, Vimeo, X and YouTube for videos in English, manual scan can be used on other platforms. It requires Windows 11 or later, and either an AI PC powered by a minimum 8-core processor from Qualcomm or Intel, or a non-AI PC with minimum 6-core from any brand, both with a minimum of 16GB of RAM and a supported browser. For system requirements and compatibility, see https://support.avast.com/article/deepfake-scam-protection-faq/ https://support.avast.com/article/deepfake-scam-protection-faq/ .
